name: Turtle Shield
description: Turtle shields are Pangolin models that trade maximum health for a much larger shield pool. They suit characters who want more shielding and can offset the health loss with defensive skills, damage reduction, or careful positioning.
notes: At higher levels, the reduced health often becomes the main drawback. They work best in builds that can restore, buffer, or otherwise compensate for the lower maximum health.

special.description: Greatly increases shield capacity, but reduces maximum health.
